title: Proclamation No. 540, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 540

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES FOUR (4) PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIOS OF DUPAG, MAGNAO, MABONGTOT AND GUINAANG, MUNICIPAL DISTRICTS OF TABUK AND LUBUAGAN, SUBPROVINCE OP KALINGA, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcels of the public domain, situated in the barrios of Dupag, Magnao, Mabong-tot and Guinaang, municipal districts of Tabuk and Lu-buagan, subprovince of Kalinga, Mountain Province, island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Psu-108596 and Psu-108263, to wit:

Lot No. 1, Psu-108596 —A parcel of land (Lot No. 1 of plan Psu-108596, G. L. E. 0. Record No. ), situated in the barrio of Dupag, municipal district of Tabuk, Mountain Province (subprovince of Kalinga). Bounded on the NE. by property of Cosed (Igorot); on the SB., by property of Bagsai et al (Igorot); on the W., by public land. and on the NW., by public land. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 66° 46′ W., 52,038.89 m more or less, from triangulation station, Tuguegarao church tower , thence S. 57° 56′ W., 146.98 m. to point 2 ; thence N.  10° 10′ E., 124.07 m. to point “3”; thence N. 61° 08’ E., 98. 44 m. to point “4”; thence S. 10° 10’ E., 93.07 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of eleven thousand and eighty-nine square meters (11,089), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, point 1 is marked “X” on stone marked P.L.S. 20 x 60 cm.; point 2 by “X” on stone marked P.L.S. 35 cm. diam.x60 cm.; point 3 by “X” on bilocanag tree 20 cm. diam.; and point 4 by “X” on anonang tree 15 cm. diam.; bearings true; declination 0° 30’ E.; date of survey, July 19 and 21-22, 1938 and May 29-30, 1939, and that of the approval, November 19, 1939.

Lot, Psu-108596. —A parcel of land (Lot No. 2 of plan Psu-108596, G. L. R. O. Record No. ), situated in the barrio of Magnao, municipal district of Tabuk, Mountain Province (subprovince of Kalinga). Bounded on the N. property of Diego Eyada; on the SE., by property of Tubban (Igorot); on the S. by property of Tubban (Igorot and on the SW. and NW., by public land. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 68° 13′ W., 46,272. 22 m. more or less, from triangulation station, Tuguegarao church tower, thence S. 36° 46′ W., 123.63 m. to point “2”; thence S. 84° 38′ W., 46.38 m. to point “3”; thence N. 73° 56′ W., 55.39 m. to point “4;” thence N. 19° 58′ W. 34.00 m. to point “5”; thence N. 30° 04′ E., 90.07 m. to point “6”; thence S. 81° 07′ E., 141.61 m. to the point of beginning; an area of fifteen thousand and twenty-seven square meters (15,027), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points 1 and 3 are marked by P. L. S. stone monuments 25×60 cm.; point 2 by “X” on Ilolio tree 30 cm. diam.; point 4 by “X’ on acacia tree 30 cm. diam.; point 5 by “X” on bagaybayon tree 35 cm. diam.; and point 6 by “X” on bagaybayon tree 30 cm. diam.; bearings true; declination 0° 30′ E-; date of survey, July 19 and 21-22, 1938 and May 29-30, 1939, and that of the approval, November 14, 1089.

Lot No. 1 (Barrio of Mabongtot tchool site). —A parcel of land (Lot No. 1 of Plan Psu-108263, G. L. R. O. Record No.         ), situated in the barrio of Mabongtot, municipal district of Lubuagan, Mountain Province (subprovince of Kalinga), island of Luzon. Bounded on the NE., by the property of Lingan; on the SE., by the properties of Ku-tata, Buccasan and Manganit (joint owners) and Wailan et. al; on the SW., by the property of Lapaw; on the W., by the properties of Sacki and Bannas, Talignok, and heirs of Patol (joint owners); and on the NW., by the property of Bessleg. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 45° 52′ E., 2,160.90 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipal district of Lubuagan, thence N. 28′ 24′ E., 39.90 m. to point “2”; thence N. 63° 22′ E., 27.37 m. to point “3”; thence S. 55° 12′ E., 50.17 m. to point “4”; thence S. 20° 58′ W., 19.36 m. to point “5”; thence S. 26°09′ W., 54.61 m. to point “6”; thence S. 23° 26′ W., 5.B3 m. to point “7”; thence N. 72° 14′ W., 59.15 m. to point “8”; thence N. 7° 54′ E., 35.82 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of five thousand seven hundred forty-five square meters (5,745), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “1”, “3”, “4”, “5”, “6”, and “7”, are marked by old P. L. S. concrete monuments, 15 x 60 cms.; points “2” and “8”, by P. L. S. stone monuments, 15x15x60 cms.; bearings true; declination 0° 33′ E.; date of survey, May 18-31, 1938 and May 2-4, 1939, and that of the approval, July 26, 1939.

Lot No. 2 (Barrio of Guinaang school site). —A parcel of land (Lot No. 2 of Plan Psu-108263, G. L. R. O. Record No. ), situated in the barrio of Guinaang, municipal district of Lubuagan, Mountain Province (subprovince of Kalinga), island of Luzon. Bounded on the N., E., S., and W., by public land. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 22° 02′ W., 4,190.09 m., more cr less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipal district of Lubuagan; N. 7 45′ W., 189.83 m. to point “2”; thence N. 75° 03′ E., 13-.S’ m. to point “3”; thence S. 5° 35′ E., 173.38 m . to point 4 . thence S. 67° 24′ W., 129.59 m. to the point of beginning, containing an area of twenty-three thousand two hundred fifty-two square meters (23,252), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “1” and “2” are marked P. L. S. boulders, 80 x 80 x 120 cms.; bearings true; declination 0° 39’ E.; date of survey, May 18-31, 1938 and May 2-4, 1939, and that of the approval, July 26, 1939.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this fifteenth day of April, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

(Sgd.) MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: (Sgd.) JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
